candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets target.

variables.notes: Clear reported total for current assets.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Could be a cash component in one year, but less standard/preferred than the direct total cash line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the year
candidates.why: Cash flow statement ending cash, but target asks for balance sheet cash.

variables.notes: R:c. Preferred balance-sheet cash line selected.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not the target total.

variables.notes: Clear reported total for current liabilities.

candidates.why: Best direct total for current financing debt; excludes trade payables and appears separate from lease liabilities.
Current portion of long-term debt; useful fallback/component but can overlap with current interest-bearing liabilities.
Specific debt component, but mostly zero/blank and likely included in broader current debt if present.

variables.notes: R:c. 'Current interest-bearing liabilities' is the preferred total STD line, but historical values suggest the separate 'Debt - Long-Term - Maturities - within 1 Year' line may represent a component not always fully captured in the reported current debt disclosure across years. Manual review recommended to avoid overlap/double counting. Lease liabilities excluded.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Best available balance-sheet total for property, plant and equipment / tangible fixed assets.
Balancing line, not the reported PPE total.
Lease-related asset, not baseline PPE total.

variables.notes: Under IFRS this is the closest reported total PPE/net tangible fixed assets line.

candidates.why: Exact net operating cash flow line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow pre-working-capital, not the final net operating cash flow target.

variables.notes: Selected the net cash flow from operating activities line.
